## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview for Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Role involves editorial oversight, workflow improvement, and client management for AI-driven content creation](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [GrowthX uses proprietary AI platform to generate blog content at scale (5-10 pieces per week per client)](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Candidate has diverse background in science writing, SEO, and AI/LLM experience](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Company is scaling rapidly, onboarding 2-3 new clients per week](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview

  - [Editorial aspect: Review and edit 15-25 pieces of content weekly](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Feedback loop: Improve AI workflows and prompts](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Client-facing: Manage 3-5 clients, ensure meeting expectations and scope](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [Work in pods with content managers who generate content](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [Focus on organic traffic and SEO, particularly Google's E-E-A-T principles](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)

### Company Background

  - [GrowthX is a marketing services agency focused on blog content](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Uses proprietary AI platform (launched mid-June) for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Emphasizes "human in the loop" approach](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Rapid growth: onboarding 2 clients/week, demand for 3/week](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)

### Candidate Background

  - [Master's in biology, transitioned to science writing and simplification](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Experience in instructional design and affiliate marketing](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [Strong SEO knowledge and experience with AI/LLM integration in workflows](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
  - [Project management experience with multiple clients](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Generate 5 pieces of content per client per week](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Balance between editing for humans vs. AI optimization](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
  - [Some clients prioritize speed and signals over perfection](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
  - [Challenge: Adapting to technical industries and cutting-edge concepts](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=1798.0)

### Current Challenges

  - [Rapid hiring led to inconsistent practices](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=1592.0)
  - [Onboarding and documentation need improvement](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)
  - [Platform limitations in scaling client management](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)
  - [Adapting to highly technical or novel industry concepts](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=1798.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Candidate to expect feedback today](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=1974.0)
  - [If progressing, next steps include:](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
      - [Another interview](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
      - [Assignment](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
      - [Panel interview (presenting assignment and discussing process)](https://fathom.video/share/yKuyLixBa8c-wSCabMaFaX9LKwCLsxRS?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
